description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named check-all-parts that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for Python scripts and one for Go scripts. The Python job should run on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest, and check ASCII filenames, case consistency in image filenames, connector numbering, duplicate files, and SVG layer IDs. The Go job should run on ubuntu-latest, install Go 1.19.3 and the fzp tool, and validate fzp files.
